faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AI video and image prompts

items.question: What is Prompt Studio?
items.answer: Prompt Studio is your comprehensive AI prompt library featuring thousands of quality AI video prompts and AI image prompts. We help creators discover high-quality examples, get inspired, and generate professional AI-generated videos and images using expertly crafted prompts for various AI models.

items.question: How does Prompt Studio work?
items.answer: You can browse our gallery for inspiration, use our prompt generator to create new ideas, and explore different AI models. Once you find or create a prompt you like, you can use it with your favorite AI image or video generator.

items.question: Is Prompt Studio free to use?
items.answer: Yes, browsing our gallery and generating prompts is completely free. Some advanced features may require an account.

items.question: What AI models does Prompt Studio support?
items.answer: We support a wide range of popular AI models for both image and video generation. Our platform is designed to be compatible with the latest and most powerful tools available.

items.question: Can I use Prompt Studio prompts with any AI generator?
items.answer: Absolutely! Our prompts are designed to be versatile and can be used with any AI image or video generation tool that accepts text-based prompts.

items.question: How do I contact support?
items.answer: You can contact our support team by emailing support@promptstudio.com. We are always happy to help!

dashboardAnalytics.title: Analytics
dashboardAnalytics.subtitle: User and activity metrics for your app in Clerk (production only).
dashboardAnalytics.clerkDesc: Sign-ups, sign-ins, active users, and retention. Customize date range and interval (daily, weekly, monthly) in Overview.
dashboardAnalytics.methodologyDesc: Summary based on Clerk's official methodology.

activeUser.title: Active user
activeUser.desc: Counted on any day the user has session activity (sign-in, token refresh, or authenticated request). Once per period regardless of devices.

signIn.title: Sign-in
signIn.desc: Each time a user completes authentication and a new session is created. Session refreshes are not counted again.

signUp.title: Sign-up
signUp.desc: When a new account is created (at account creation, not email verification).

retention.title: Retention
retention.desc: Percentage of users who signed up in a period and returned in a later period (cohort model).

freshness.title: Data freshness
freshness.desc: Updated daily. Complete metrics through the previous UTC day; projections update in near real time.

dashboardAnalytics.faqDev: Development instance data is excluded; production only.
dashboardAnalytics.faqBots: Machine-to-machine (M2M) sessions are excluded; real user accounts only.

readability.analyzerDesc: Flesch-Kincaid (EN) and Fernández-Huerta (ES): sentence length, keyword density, and heading structure for humans and AI crawlers.
readability.bodyPlaceholder: Paste your article, landing copy, or FAQ answers…
readability.emptyState: Paste text above to run the analysis.
readability.tipNoHeadings: Add H1–H3 headings so scanners and AI indexers understand your outline.
readability.tipMissingH1: Add exactly one H1 with the main topic.
readability.tipMultipleH1: Use a single H1; demote extra titles to H2.
readability.tipSkippedHeading: Do not skip levels (e.g. H2 → H4); keep a logical hierarchy.
readability.tipNoSubheadings: Break long sections with H2/H3 subheadings.
readability.tipLongHeadings: Shorten headings; aim for under ~60 characters.
readability.tipLongSentences: Split sentences longer than ~20 words for easier scanning.
readability.tipChoppySentences: Combine very short sentences to improve flow.
readability.tipLowEase: Simplify vocabulary and shorten sentences to raise reading ease.
readability.tipVeryEasy: Content is very easy; add depth if targeting expert readers.
readability.tipKeywordStuffing: Reduce repeated keywords; aim for natural 0.8–2.5% density.
readability.tipWeakFocus: Strengthen topical focus with a clear primary keyword.
readability.tipGood: Copy and heading structure look balanced for readers and indexers.
